comment: The pins are super good and very useful and informative .. It is a cool source of multiple ideas and unique inspiration. Just one drawback is the chat interface .. it does not show whether the person whom you want to talk to is active or not, it does not allow you to delete your messages and does not support sending images. It would be good if you improve it ..
the function of activity: Activity involves searching, accessing menus, filtering, viewing various content categories, managing pins, profiles, settings, creating, sharing, and navigating within the interface.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Updates', 'description': 'View recent updates or notifications.'}, {'name': 'Inbox', 'description': 'Access your inbox to view messages or conversations.'}, {'name': 'New message', 'description': 'Compose and send a new message.'}, {'name': 'Messages', 'description': 'Access and view your messages or conversations.'}, {'name': 'Contacts', 'description': 'View your list of contacts.'}, {'name': 'Avatar', 'description': 'View the avatar/profile picture associated with a contact or user.'}, {'name': 'Say hello', 'description': 'Initiate a conversation or greet a contact.'}]
